description: Workbook 5 — Tier 1 functional synthesis, morphological matrices, and 3D layout (P1-P6)

cells.I: Analyse life phases, establish requirements on the technical process and technical system
Analyse environment of the individual life cycle processes especially TS(s)-operational process, the TP(s), and its users
